# Ketan Raj

> Ketan Raj is a software engineer at Emergent (YC-backed) and previously at Google. He builds agentic AI — planning loops, tool use, structured memory, and the human-in-the-loop safeguards that let agents run reliably in production — along with intelligent backends and developer-facing systems. This site collects his work, writing, and an AI agent visitors can talk to.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ketanraj.com/): Overview, current focus, and an AI agent trained on Ketan's work that you can talk to by voice or text.
- [Projects & Writing](https://ketanraj.com/projects): Selected products and side projects (Origin, Reublic, Imagine) plus essays on agentic AI, LLM tooling, and engineering at scale.
- [Work](https://ketanraj.com/work): Professional experience — roles at Emergent and Google, what he built, and the systems he focuses on now.
- [About](https://ketanraj.com/about): Background, how he works, the stack he reaches for, and what he's reading and thinking about.
- [Contact](https://ketanraj.com/contact): How to reach Ketan for collaborations, advisory, speaking, or hiring.

## Writing

- [Build your Agent: A Deep Dive into Google ADK and Streamlit Integration](https://medium.com/@ketanraaz/build-your-agent-a-deep-dive-into-google-adk-and-streamlit-integration-cee9d79164e4): Wiring Google ADK agents into a Streamlit UI — state, tool calls, and the smallest viable agentic chatbot.
- [The 60-Year-Old Algorithm We Thought Was Unbeatable Just Got Dethroned](https://medium.com/@ketanraaz/the-60-year-old-algorithm-we-thought-was-unbeatable-just-got-dethroned-388486641238): A 2025 result that beats Dijkstra on shortest-path bounds once thought optimal.
- [Why Google Put Its Billions of Lines of Code Into One Repo](https://medium.com/@ketanraaz/why-google-put-its-billions-of-lines-of-code-into-one-0a0241ac60b3): Notes on the trade-offs of a monorepo at Google scale.

## Elsewhere

- [GitHub](https://github.com/RaazKetan): Open-source projects spanning agents, full-stack apps, and tooling.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ketanraj): Professional profile and updates.
- [Medium](https://medium.com/@ketanraaz): Long-form essays on AI, algorithms, and engineering.
- [Topmate](https://topmate.io/ketan_raj): Book a 1:1 session.
